title: Grand Flag Hoisting
description: The Prime Minister of India hoists the National Flag at Red Fort followed by an inspiring speech to the nation. A grand celebration with military parade and cultural performances.

title: Patriotic Cultural Program
description: Performances by artists from all states of India showcasing the rich cultural diversity and unity of our great nation. Music, dance, and art come together in a vibrant celebration.

title: Freedom March
description: A commemorative march retracing the steps of our freedom fighters, celebrating the spirit of independence, unity and patriotism across the capital.
